case_title: CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. BEVERLY MENAGED ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-29-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (DECLARATION OF LUIS DUENAS) (TRANSACTION ID # 60969014) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC
NOTICE OF CONTINUED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING (TRANSACTION ID # 61460853) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 61581024)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-29-2017 CONTINUED TO NOV-28-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. THE AUG-29-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 61224516) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 61224719), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC SERVED OCT-07-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MENAGED, BEVERLY AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION OF LUIS DUENAS IN RESPONSE TO OSC RE: PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 61299643) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MENAGED, BEVERLY AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-11-2017

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-28-2017 CONTINUED TO JAN-30-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-28-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-30-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
